summary: List Punch Item Assignee Filter Options
description: Returns users assigned to punch items with pagination and optional search

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query to filter assignees by name or company

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Set to 'recycle_bin' to return filter options from deleted punch items

schema.description: Response containing user filter options with login information details

data.description: List of available user filter options

items.description: A user filter option with login information

id.description: The unique identifier of the user

login.description: The email address of the user

name.description: The display name of the user

company_name.description: The company name associated with the user
